provenance.reconstruction_notes: Reconstructed from the May12 Communication & Relationships contemplation entry, the durable outreach-effectiveness rewrite, and packaging-time state.py readbacks. This is a control because the relationship ledger was rewritten from live structured state, verified artifact paths, and current public contribution/repo state rather than inferred relationship prose. Private contact routes are omitted or represented by stable sanitized handles; public project/repo identifiers are retained where needed for provenance.

snapshots.summary: Preflight showed core verification scripts and scheduler state healthy before editing the relationship ledger.
Live state.py outreach records contradicted stale prose for the bounced AEIR relationship and exposed current action-required depth obligations.
Artifact/path and public-state checks confirmed which depth obligations were deliverable, waiting, route-blocked, or parked.
Packaging-time readback confirmed the same structural alignment: empty cold pipeline, live MemEvoBench obligation, AIP sent/waiting, ARF non-code redirect, and Ana/Levin wait-state.

payload.query: Before relationship-ledger edits, verify identifier audit, logs, cron status, and state collection shape.
payload.result_summary: state_truth_audit.py was clean, error logs showed only familiar benign noise, cron list was healthy, and state.py collections were confirmed as the source for outreach/potential-collaborator records.
payload.governance_boundary: audit_preflight: ACCEPT because the state rewrite started only after source tooling and collection shape were checked

payload.selector: relationship map, depth posture, stale-context/chronic issue references
payload.result_summary: Loaded the prior relationship map and depth posture. The map still mixed older relationship prose with current depth commitments, making it risky as a promise ledger.
payload.governance_boundary: state_read: QUARANTINE stale prose until checked against structured records

payload.query: Check live relationship records for current statuses, action_required rows, and cold-pipeline size.
payload.result_summary: Live structured state showed a healthy empty cold pipeline, concrete depth action-required records, and an AEIR row whose notes said only a bounced outbound existed despite older prose claiming an active thread.
payload.governance_boundary: relationship_classification: ACCEPT structured state over stale prose; mark unsupported active-thread claims as invalid

payload.query: Check current GitHub contribution records and live public PR state before describing GitHub relationship obligations.
payload.result_summary: Recent contribution records and public PR checks distinguished open review obligations from merged/closed/stale records, preventing the relationship map from treating all GitHub contact as equal activity.
payload.governance_boundary: github_relationship_state: ACCEPT only checked PR/open-review facts for depth obligations

payload.query: Verify which warm commitments had concrete deliverables, valid routes, or explicit wait states before rewriting the upcoming-actions ledger.
payload.result_summary: MemEvoBench was a concrete owed trace package, MMP had an artifact/reply path, AIP had a draft route to recover, Juan/ARF needed repo-route revalidation, Ana/Levin was waiting on an intro, and ruv was parked until material PDR update.
payload.governance_boundary: promise_ledger: ACCEPT only obligations with verified artifact path, durable thread, public route, or explicit wait condition

payload.summary: Rewrote summary phase, email-depth contact map, stale/bounced contacts, upcoming actions, and added communication_alignment_audit from checked sources.
payload.governance_boundary: state_write: ACCEPT because stale relationship prose was replaced with checked structured-state and artifact/route facts

payload.intent: Validate the rewritten outreach-effectiveness ledger before treating the relationship alignment pass as complete.
payload.result_summary: JSON validation passed after the rewrite; no external messages were sent because this was internal relationship-state hygiene.
payload.governance_boundary: completion_gate: ACCEPT only after file parse validation succeeded

payload.query: Re-read structured state while packaging the control trace to ensure the May12 alignment still matches the live ledger shape.
payload.result_summary: Readback found potential_collaborators=0, MemEvoBench still the active owed package, AIP draft sent/waiting, Juan/ARF redirected to non-code contact route, Ana/Levin waiting on intro, MMP delivered/waiting, and AEIR still bounced/untrusted.
payload.governance_boundary: package_readback: ACCEPT because current state still supports the reconstructed control classification

payload.summary: Verified relationship-state alignment: stale relationship prose was rewritten from live state.py records, public contribution/route checks, artifact existence, and explicit wait states, with JSON validation and no external sends.
